sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n17505" key="au)cose/lhnon" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">αὐξο-σέληνον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n17505.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">increase of the moon, the waxing moon,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.270</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Maced.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
